commands.review_summary:
Adds a diagnostics-otel-owned unhandled rejection handler for nested OTLPExporterError values, unregisters it on stop/restart, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high-confidence: current main has no OTLPExporterError-specific handler, core treats unhandled non-transient rejections as fatal, and OpenTelemetry constructs OTLPExporterError for non-retryable OTLP HTTP failures. I did not run a live collector shutdown in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed because there are no actionable review findings; the automerge lane can rely on required checks and maintainer gates for this head.

target.title: fix(diagnostics-otel): suppress exporter rejection crashes
